//: CI dogfood smoke-test config. Used ONLY by .github/workflows/dogfood-smoke.yml on ubuntu-latest. NOT a developer/operator config — three reference MCP servers from @modelcontextprotocol on npm, picked because they boot on a vanilla Linux runner without any secrets, external repos, or platform-specific paths.
//npx: command='${NPX}' resolved from --env-file at runtime. Gateway validator requires absolute paths for command (PATH lookup is forbidden — hijack vector); the workflow renders a .env file via `which npx` after actions/setup-node and passes it with --env-file. ${NPX} is NOT in the gateway's expand-allowlist, so this only works through the explicit env-file path.
